note: Created NetworkStreamMockSocketTests.cs with 21 tests covering: ObjectDisposedException after disposal (Read, Write, ReadAsync, WriteAsync, BeginRead, BeginWrite, DataAvailable), DataAvailable property (returns false/true, calls poll), StreamReader/StreamWriter delegation, BinaryReader/BinaryWriter compatibility (WriteInt32, WriteDouble, WriteString, ReadInt32, ReadBytes, ReadBoolean, round-trip). Also added stub_poll_return/stub_poll_call_count to stub_wgsocket.c. All 21 tests pass.
